Freeze the dynamic moment

Package List:

"product": {"desc": "

Dual Twin Mount Adapter For GoPro Hero 13 12 11 10 9 8 7 6 5 4 SJCAM AKASO Insta360 X2 X3 X4 DJI Osmo Action Camera Accessories

Features:

1. Mounting Dual Cameras: The dual mount adapter allows two sports cameras to be mounted at the same time. For example, you can mount 2 action cameras together, or mount an action camera and a fill light together.
2. Multi-angle shooting: When used with the 90 degree direction mount adapter and short vertical degree straight joint mount adapter, you can shoot the scene from any angle of front, back, left and right as needed; You can even shoot horizontally and vertically at the same time.
3. Multiple ways to use: You can use any of them individually or in combination. When you need to mount two large size cameras (like 2 Hero 10 cameras) together, we recommend you to combine them.
4. Wide range of applications: Suitable for most GoPro hero accessories such as GoPro handgrip, selfie stick, tripod, head strap, chest harness mount etc.
5. Wide Compatibility: The dual twin mount adapter is compatible with GoPro Hero 13, Hero 12, Hero 11, GoPro Hero 10, Hero 9, Hero 8, Hero 7, Hero 6, Hero 5, Hero 4, Session, Hero 3+, Hero 3, Hero 2, Hero 1, Fusion, GoPro Max; it also fits for DJI Osmo, Sjcam, AKASO, Xiaoyi action and most action cameras.

Compatible with:

* GoPro Hero 13 12 11 10 9 8 7 6 5 4 3 Black Max
* Insta360
* DJI Osmo Action 1/2/3/4/5
* SJCAM SJ4000 SJ5000 SJ6 SJ7 SJ8 SJ10 SJ11 M20 C100 C200 C300
* AKASO EK7000 V50 Brave
* Xiaomi Yi 4K+ / APEMAN / Dragon Touch
* And Other most action camera

Note:

1. This link contains multiple options. Please select the accessories you need to purchase.
2. This camera and monopod are not included.
